ideation: This animation sequence simulates the exchange of currency.  The robot will use both arms to represent the giving and receiving of money.  The sequence starts with both arms extended forward, palms up, to symbolize offering something.  Then, one arm moves to the side, as if receiving something, while the other remains extended. Finally, both arms return to a neutral position. This mimics the exchange process. I'll ensure the transitions are smooth and expressive.

frames.beat: both arms open, palms up, offering currency
the right arm lowers, accepting the exchange
both arms return to rest, transaction complete
